title: Tiger 24
subTitle: After a wild tiger kills two men in its territory, it's declared a man-eater and relocated to a zoo, causing massive social uproar.

title: Battle of the Alphas
subTitle: Australia is home to an eclectic array of creatures, and the ways to succeed as an alpha are just as diverse. The beach turns into a duelling ground, and the outback becomes a boxing ring, as animals face off with their own kind.

title: Life Among Lions
subTitle: Jorge Alesanco is the first man that was accepted by a pride of wild lions. But getting to know the great lion kings of the Savannah has been the work of years, full of difficult moments.

title: San Diego: America's Wildest City
subTitle: Experiencing the hidden wonders of San Diego, where humans and wildlife coexist in the country's most biodiverse urban landscape.

title: Animal Armory
subTitle: The archer fish spits water from a "blowgun" in its mouth to capture bugs, while the jawfish spits pebbles from its mouth to defend itself.

title: Animal Armory
subTitle: Cuttlefish and squid eject a black fluid to help them hide from predators, while skunks aren't the only animals to use scent glands for defence.

title: The new animal kingdom Japan
subTitle: A young fox tries to find a new territory on the island of Honshu in Japan. Along the way, he encounters a variety of animals trying to adapt to an ever-changing environment.

title: San Diego: America's Wildest City
subTitle: Experiencing the hidden wonders of San Diego, where humans and wildlife coexist in the country's most biodiverse urban landscape.

title: Animal Armory
subTitle: Many animals such as toads, moths, snakes and spiders have poison glands, while the spines of the stone fish and the scorpion fish are poisonous.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: When a sea monster washes up on an English beach, Jeremy Wade sets off to unmask the beast. His journey takes him to the ice sheets of Greenland and Norway.

title: Lethal Attractions
subTitle: In Africa's wilderness, there's no such thing as a free lunch. Predator and prey are well-matched. A worthwhile meal means going up against gut-gouging horns, venomous fangs and stampeding hooves.

title: Brave Wilderness
subTitle: Coyote endures searing pain after being stung by a Japanese giant hornet.

title: Brave Wilderness
subTitle: Coyote Peterson gets pinched by a giant stag beetle during his journey.

title: Life Among Lions
subTitle: Jorge Alesanco is the first man that was accepted by a pride of wild lions. But getting to know the great lion kings of the Savannah has been the work of years, full of difficult moments.

title: Wild Fighters
subTitle: Territory is home, the place where animals rest, find food or have their children. Many animals are very territorial: they mark, protect and defend their small nations against the invasion of strangers: their survival depends on it.

title: Battle of the Alphas
subTitle: With real-life duelling dragons, giant sumo-wrestling beetles, street-fighting monkeys, and sea turtles that play king of the hill on top of another sea turtle, Southeast Asia boasts a wide range of wildlife warriors.

title: Battle of the Alphas
subTitle: The USA is big on flash and spectacle. Bighorn rams rattle the mountaintops, brown bears battle, desperate to fatten up for winter, sharp-tailed grouse shake their tail-feathers on the dance floor, and wild stallions rumble with beauty and grace.

title: Wild Fighters
subTitle: Exploring the many species that live in complex and hierarchical societies.

title: Battle of the Alphas
subTitle: From the Highlands to the Alps, Europe's evocative landscapes are the backdrop for epic wildlife drama. Normally stoic red deer go wild during the rut, wolf packs clash over territory, and foxes do the foxtrot, but it's not as nice as it sounds.

title: Battle of the Alphas
subTitle: Wildebeest battle for herd hierarchy, floppy fish fight it out on land and locusts give up their vegetarian ways in a frenzy of cannibalism. It all happens on the wild and wide-open landscape of South Africa.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Jeremy Wade investigates a case in Nepal that sounds strangely familiar - a lone fisherman dragged off his feet and into a mountain river by the original river monster, the goonch catfish.

title: Brave Wilderness
subTitle: Adventurer and animal expert Coyote Peterson and his crew go on a wild world of adventure as they encounter various animals up close and learn new things about them.

title: Brave Wilderness
subTitle: Adventurer and animal expert Coyote Peterson and his crew go on a wild world of adventure as they encounter various animals up close and learn new things about them.

title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: Cameras capture the beauty, diversity and richness of the world's forests and jungles.

title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: Cameras capture the beauty, diversity and richness of the world's forests and jungles.

title: Becoming Prey
subTitle: Mawindo is the Swahili Word for prey. Life in the African Savannah is hard on herbivores but as in the case of predators, they too have their own strategies and skills to survive. However, none of them are prepared for the great hunter.

title: Life Among Lions
subTitle: An expert on lions shares the journey undertaken to be accepted by a pride of wild lions and offers insights into their intricate social structures.

title: Wild Thailand
subTitle: Northern Thailand is dominated by mountains and cloaked in forest. It hides ancient creatures and surprising partnerships. To survive here both the wildlife and people rely on maintaining the natural harmony of the mysterious north.

title: Animal Arms Race
subTitle: The world's plains are home to some of the biggest concentrations of animals in the world, where some are seemingly easy targets.

title: Animal Arms Race
subTitle: In this big blue battleground, every creature has its own array of weapons for finding prey or avoiding becoming prey themselves.

subTitle: Cameras capture the beauty, diversity and richness of the world's forests and jungles.

title: The new animal kingdom Japan
subTitle: Winter has gripped the north of Honshu and Hokkaido. The fox and its partner are expecting a litter of cubs, but it is difficult to find food. They each go their own way in search of food.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Jeremy Wade travels the United States in search of river monsters living in the nation's waterways. He goes from the Indian River Lagoon in Florida to the Lake of the Ozarks in Missouri.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: The disappearance of three men in Russia proves to be a baffling case for Jeremy Wade. He embarks on a trip to the Amur River where he seeks to uncover what happened to them.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: When he hears of an attack in a Mongolian river, Jeremy Wade wonders if it could be the work of a very rare fish. Pound for pound, this fish is said to be one of the strongest.

title: Lake Life: Secrets Beneath the Surface
subTitle: Dive beneath the surface to explore rare species, geological wonders and unique ecosystems in Germany's and Austria's most stunning lakes.

title: Lake Life: Secrets Beneath the Surface
subTitle: Dive beneath the surface to explore rare species, geological wonders and unique ecosystems in Germany's and Austria's most stunning lakes.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: There is little room for mistakes when we enter into the wild world of animals. Tourist Ria Cilliers and her husband find themselves sharing their morning coffee with a leopard.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: Tourist Adam Malski is eager to fulfil his lifelong dream of going shark cage diving with great white sharks, but his best sighting comes while he is on the boat.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: Yasmin Tajik is amazed at how a leopard that has been watching impalas move below the tree it's perched in leaps out in one swift movement and kills one of them.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: A regular morning spear fishing turns into a horror film for spear fisherman Eugene van Wyngaardt as he finds himself in a one-on-one situation with a great white shark.

title: The new animal kingdom Japan
subTitle: A young fox tries to find a new territory on the island of Honshu in Japan. Along the way, he encounters a variety of animals trying to adapt to an ever-changing environment.

title: The new animal kingdom Japan
subTitle: Winter has gripped the north of Honshu and Hokkaido. The fox and its partner are expecting a litter of cubs, but it is difficult to find food. They each go their own way in search of food.

title: Zambia Untamed
subTitle: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighbourhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it's a daily battle to stay alive.

title: The Secret Life Of The Hermit Crab
subTitle: Dives into the life cycle of hermit crabs in Guadeloupe as they embark on their migration journey to release their eggs into the ocean.

title: Africas Secret Creatures
subTitle: Diverse animal species display unique resilience and behaviour, facing numerous challenges as they adapt and struggle to survive in the wild.

title: Project Tiger
subTitle: The director highlights the incredible comeback of tigers, from a dwindling population due to hunting and poaching to thriving in their wild habitats once more.

title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: A look at how the conservation of forests and jungles is vital to many species, and the only guarantee for future generations to enjoy these precious treasures.

title: Lioness in Exile
subTitle: Manyari takes an unusual step when she takes her young cubs away from the sanctuary of the clan.

title: Tiger Guards Of Kanha
subTitle: Forest guards and patrolling officers at Kanha Tiger Reserve highlight the history since its inception and talk about the gruesome attacks on the staff.

title: Tiger Guards Of Kanha
subTitle: Explore the activities in a day of a tiger guard who faces various challenges on daily patrol. Also discover how one guard survived a bear ambush while on duty.

title: Tiger Guards Of Kanha
subTitle: The guards risk their lives both to protect the tigers from the brutality of the poachers and to safeguard themselves from the attack of dangerous beasts.

title: Tiger Guards Of Kanha
subTitle: Resident veterinarians seek the assistance of domesticated elephants in order to sedate the tigers and relocate them to a secure location.

title: Wild By Nature
subTitle: Actor and naturalist Arturo Islas explores several types of habitats in search of many species of animals and shares interesting and fascinating facts about them.

title: Wild and Wonderful Denmark
subTitle: Getting up close and personal with Danish wildlife that live in the country's forests. The cameras film inside a fox den with a mother fox and her newborn cubs, and follow a majestic golden eagle whilst it is out hunting.

title: Natural Born Monsters
subTitle: Sean Duggan travels to Thailand to investigate the giant snakehead fish in its native habitat. Sean's expedition takes him from Thailand to snakehead-infested Arkansas to see if this killer fish can be stopped.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: When Jeremy Wade travels to the Himalayas to investigate river attacks, he learns that the suspected culprit is a sacred animal and is forewarned not to touch the creature.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Jeremy Wade visits Australia's Fitzroy River in search of one of the worlds rarest and least known fish: the Northern River Shark. It's so elusive that only 20 have been caught.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: From the swamps in southern Africa there are stories of a piranha-like fish that hunts in marauding packs. Jeremy Wade heads into the watery labyrinth to find this deadly swarm.

title: Rise Of Jaguars
subTitle: The filmmaker explores the lives of the elusive jaguars, highlighting their intelligence and hunting prowess that make them one of the most formidable predators in the world.

title: Rise Of Jaguars
subTitle: The filmmaker explores the lives of the elusive jaguars, highlighting their intelligence and hunting prowess that make them one of the top predators in the world.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: In the Kruger National Park in South Africa, Dianne finds a boomslang and a chameleon in a duel on the tar road. Not an environment where they would encounter each other under any normal circumstances.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: Yasmin Tajik is amazed at how a leopard that has been watching impalas move below the tree it's perched in leaps out in one swift movement and kills one of them.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: A showcase of some of wildlife's most remarkable moments, caught on film by amateurs and professionals. We reveal the full spectrum of animal behaviour: the brutal, the beautiful and the bizarre. Each moment is explained by experts in the field.

subTitle: In the Kruger National Park in South Africa, Dianne finds a boomslang and a chameleon in a duel on the tar road. Not an environment where they would encounter each other under any normal circumstances.

title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
subTitle: Encountering coastal sea wolves, endangered marmots, western toad tadpoles, and more while exploring the island of Vancouver, one of the most extraordinary ecosystems on the planet.

title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
subTitle: The sandy island of K'Gari, formerly Fraser Island, stretches off the east coast of Australia.

title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
subTitle: Journey to the largest island in the Canadian Arctic and encounter Arctic foxes, white beluga whales, a never-before-filmed two-tusked narwhal, and other remarkable animals.

title: Wild Fighters
subTitle: Investigating the different reasons that lead animals to face tough disputes.

title: Deadliest South Africa
subTitle: Kurdt Greenwood's is on a quest is to seek out South Africa's 12 most deadly snakes and to educate and inspire people to see the value of these often misunderstood creatures.

subTitle: The crew looks at the various challenges mothers of different species face to survive and keep their cubs alive.

subTitle: Surviving the vast mountains of Italy, the chamois are an endemic group of species that are facing a series threat of extinction.

title: Italy: The Last Wilderness Year 1
subTitle: Explore the life of a family of brown bears in a year, the special characteristics of the rutting season of Roe Deer in the Mountains of Central Italy, and the migration of salamanders in autumn.

subTitle: The forests that grow in the dry and mountainous regions of Madagascar. They are home to the ring-tailed lemur, pied crow, species of tenrec and unique chameleons.
